info.title: PathStash Relay API
info.description: Account- and team-scoped workspace sync, tokens, devices, encrypted secrets, blobs, manifests, file inventory, audit events, and billing session endpoints for PathStash.

200.description: Relay, database, and non-secret configuration status

post.summary: Send an admin-gated transactional email smoke test
post.description: Requires RELAY_ADMIN_TOKEN bearer auth. Sends a fixed PathStash email through the configured transactional email provider without creating an account.

200.description: Smoke email accepted by the configured provider

400.description: Invalid request body or recipient email

502.description: Configured provider rejected the smoke email

post.summary: Create a password account and send email verification

201.description: Pending account and verification delivery state

202.description: Account created, but email delivery failed

503.description: Email verification is not configured; production signup is temporarily unavailable

Retry-After.description: Seconds until the client should retry.

post.summary: Verify account email with a one-time token

429.description: Verification attempts are temporarily rate limited

Retry-After.description: Seconds until the client should retry.

post.summary: Resend a verification email for an unverified account
post.description: Returns a generic success response for missing or already verified accounts so account existence is not exposed.

202.description: Verification resend request accepted, but email delivery failed

429.description: Resend attempts are temporarily rate limited

Retry-After.description: Seconds until the client should retry.

post.summary: Log in with email and password

Set-Cookie.description: HttpOnly pathstash_session cookie for browser dashboard access.

Retry-After.description: Seconds until the client should retry.

post.summary: Send an email-verified password setup link

429.description: Password setup requests are temporarily rate limited

Retry-After.description: Seconds until the client should retry.

post.summary: Set a password with an email setup token

429.description: Password setup completion is temporarily rate limited

Retry-After.description: Seconds until the client should retry.

post.description: Requires a browser session and current password. Sends a confirmation link to the new email address before changing the account email.

202.description: Email change accepted, but email delivery failed

400.description: Invalid email, unchanged email, or missing current password

403.description: Browser session required or current password is incorrect

429.description: Email change requests are temporarily rate limited

Retry-After.description: Seconds until the client should retry.

post.summary: Confirm an account email change token

400.description: Invalid or expired email change token

429.description: Email change completion is temporarily rate limited

Retry-After.description: Seconds until the client should retry.

post.summary: Change password for the current browser session
post.description: Requires a browser session and the current password. API bearer tokens cannot change a human login password.

400.description: Missing current password or invalid new password

403.description: Browser session required or current password is incorrect

get.summary: List browser sessions for the current account

post.description: Hosted relays disable this by default and return 410 password_signup_required. Use /v1/auth/signup for password signup and email verification.

get.summary: Get account, devices, workspaces, subscription, usage, and entitlements

get.description: Returns profile, plan, usage, devices, browser sessions, visible workspaces, teams, token metadata, secret inventory metadata, and recent audit events. Plaintext secret values and API token values are not included.

parameters.name: before
parameters.description: Return events created before this timestamp.

get.summary: Export account audit events as NDJSON

parameters.name: before
parameters.description: Return events created before this timestamp.

402.description: Team plan required for audit export

get.summary: List teams for the authenticated account

200.description: Active teams and pending invites for the account email
Team, active members, pending invites for managers, and shared workspaces

201.description: Pending invite. The one-time token, dashboard accept URL, and email delivery status are returned only in this response.

200.description: Invite revoked and team details returned
Invite accepted and team details returned
Member role updated and team details returned
Member removed and team details returned

expiresInDays.description: Optional token lifetime in days. Do not send with expiresAt.

expiresAt.description: Optional absolute expiration time. Do not send with expiresInDays.

scopes.description: Optional bearer-token scopes. Omit for full_access compatibility. full_access must be the only scope when present.

get.summary: List workspaces visible to the authenticated account

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: List active workspaces by default. Use archived for soft-archived rows or all for both.

200.description: Solo and shared team workspaces visible to the caller

teamId.description: Optional team id. Requires an active Team entitlement and active team membership.

402.description: Plan workspace limit reached, or device limit reached when registering an initial workspace device

patch.summary: Update workspace name or root path

200.description: Workspace archived and hidden from normal account and agent flows
Workspace restored and visible in normal account and agent flows

parameters.name: maxBlobBytes
parameters.description: Blob limit used to classify large files. Defaults to 67108864 bytes.

200.description: Workspace file inventory with totals, large file entries, and manifest metadata
Secret names, key ids, formats, metadata, and timestamps without ciphertext
Encrypted secret record including ciphertext, nonce, key id, format, metadata, and timestamps

411.description: Content-Length is required for account blob uploads

409.description: Blob hash was previously recorded for this account with a different size

get.summary: Get account subscription, usage, and entitlements

200.description: Current plan, Stripe subscription status, account usage, and active plan entitlements

502.description: Stripe checkout failed or returned an unexpected session payload

503.description: Billing or Stripe webhook signing is not configured

post.summary: Sync a returned Stripe Checkout Session
post.description: Retrieves a Checkout Session after redirect, verifies ownership, and updates local subscription state once the session is complete.

404.description: Checkout session does not belong to the account

409.description: Checkout session is not complete yet

post.description: Retrieves the account's stored Stripe subscription and reapplies the latest plan, status, and current period after customer-portal changes or webhook lag.

409.description: stripe_subscription_required: a Stripe subscription id is required before subscription sync can run

post.summary: Create a Stripe customer portal session

409.description: Stripe customer id is required before a portal session can be created

502.description: Stripe customer portal failed or returned an unexpected session payload

parameters.name: Stripe-Signature
parameters.description: Stripe webhook signature header used to verify the raw payload within the five-minute freshness window.

200.description: Webhook accepted. Duplicate processed Stripe event ids return duplicate: true without replaying side effects.

409.description: A previous delivery for the same Stripe event id is still processing

503.description: Stripe webhook secret is not configured

tokens.description: Token metadata only. Token values are not included.

secrets.description: Secret inventory metadata only. Plaintext values and ciphertext payloads are not included.

subscriptionSynced.description: Present on checkout sync responses. True when the linked Stripe subscription was fetched and applied immediately.

verificationUrl.description: Development-only fallback link when email is unconfigured outside production.
Development-only fallback link when email is unconfigured outside production.

value.description: Returned only when the token is created.

token.description: Returned only when the invite is created.

acceptEndpoint.description: Returned only when the invite is created.

acceptUrl.description: Dashboard accept link returned only when the invite is created.

inviteDelivery.description: Email delivery status returned only when the invite is created.

inviteDeliveryProviderId.description: Email provider id when delivery succeeds.
